我很荣幸能够来到这里 I'm so honored to be here,
纪念陆路战役150周年 celebrating the 150th anniversary of the Overland Campaign.

当然  还要感谢 and, of course,
奥基弗州长组织了如此精彩的三日活动 to Governor O'Keefe for organizing such a wonderful three-day event.

至少很短小 Or at least it's short.

个人而言  我并不以南部邦联为荣 I personally take no pride in the Confederacy.
打不赢的仗就不要打 Avoid wars you can't win,
更不要为奴隶制这样愚蠢的原因而战 and never raise your flag for a asinine cause like slavery.
-他就来  -好 - He's on his way. - Fine.
人们会忘记这事的 People will move on.
不会的  你说的越少  他们越会去挖掘 They won't. The less you say, the more they'll dig.
那就让他们挖 Let them.

我就在外面 I'll be right outside.
麦金尼斯的事发生在大学时期 McGinnis happened in college.
堕胎则是五年之后的事 The abortion happened five years later.
没有留下任何病历 There aren't any medical records.
完全没有吗 None at all?
我们特别确保了这一点 We specifically made sure.
护士呢  等候室的人呢 A nurse? Somebody in the waiting room?
只有医生一个人在场 The doctor was the only one there.
那他现在在哪里 Then where is he now?

如果我都不担心  那你也不必 And if I'm not worried, you shouldn't be.
就算如此  性侵的事现在成为焦点了 Even still, sexual assault is part of the conversation now.
所有的文章和专栏都会提到你 Every article and column mentions you.
如果我们不提供素材  就无法塑造你的形象 If we offer nothing, we can't shape your image.
我说的很清楚  我不想曝光 I made it very clear I don't want exposure.
等我们有新东西可说的时候  我们再说 When we have something new to say, we'll say it.
薇拉  参谋长联席会议那边怎么样了 Willa. Any luck with the Joint Chiefs?
主席办公室还是说他没空 The Chairman's Office still says he's unavailable.
但他们说可以派参谋部主任过来 But they did offer to send the Director of the Joint Staff,
明天上午11点 11:00 a.m. tomorrow.
定下来 Confirm it.
我们去白宫西楼弗兰西斯的办公室见   We'll meet in Francis' office at the West Wing.
还有别的事吗 Anything else?
没了  我该出发了 No. I should get going, hit the road.
谢谢你  康纳 Thank you, Connor.
接通布鲁克斯议员女士的电话 Get Congresswoman Brooks on the phone.
看看第一夫人今天下午是否有空 And see if the First Lady will be available this afternoon.
你想要给中国所有参加峰会的人做简报吗 You want a brief on everyone on the Chinese side of the Summit?
不  杜兰特在华盛顿做的只是表面功夫 No. What Durant's doing in Washington is just the facade.
这可是真正的谈判 This is the real negotiation.
把你手上关于冯的资料都给我 Give me what you have on Feng.
冯山德  家族在共产党内很有影响 Xander Feng. Deep family connections to the Party.
他祖父曾跟毛泽东肩并肩作战 Grandfather fought side by side with Mao.
在电信业势力很大 Big in the telecom industry.
净资产估计有五百亿 Estimated net worth is over 50 billion.
比雷蒙德还有钱 More than Raymond's.
多几十亿  但谁在乎呢 By a few billion. But who's counting?
除了稀土金属精炼厂之外 Do they have any other business partnerships
他们还有其他商业合作吗 other than the Rare Earth Refinery?
我没有发现 Not that I could find.
好吧  向杜兰特询问一下进度 All right. Get a progress update from Durant.
告诉她我们一得知冯的要求就通知她 Tell her I'll be in touch as soon as we know what Feng wants.
雷蒙德·塔斯克这样的人涉足外交事务 When a man like Raymond Tusk gets involved in state diplomacy,
绝不是为了获得诺贝尔和平奖 you can be sure he's not after the Nobel Peace Prize.
他是个机会主义者  但我也是 He's an opportunist. But so am I.
也许这是我的机会  能让他放松对总统的控制 Maybe this is my opportunity to loosen his grip on the President.
副总统先生  你什么时候回华盛顿 Mr. Vice President, when are you returning to Washington?
-副总统先生  你是否...  -副总统先生 - Mr. Vice President, are you... - Mr. Vice President,
你会在斯波特瑟尔韦尼亚待多久 do you have any idea how long you'll be in Spotsylvania?
对于跟中国的谈判有什么看法吗 Any comments on the talks with the Chinese?
能否就即将到来的峰会谈判发表一下看法 Can we get a comment on the upcoming Summit talks?
副总统今天 Vice President will be working
将在自己的房间里办公 from his room for the remainder of the day.
有消息再通知你们 We'll let you know.
先生  你什么时候回华盛顿 Sir, when are you returning to Washington?
冯先生  很高兴见到你 Mr. Feng. It's a pleasure.
彼此彼此  副总统先生 Likewise, Mr. Vice President.
喝咖啡还是喝茶 Coffee? Tea?
有人问过了  谢谢 I've already been offered, but thank you.
谢谢你  密查姆 Thank you, Meechum.
从北京飞过来时间很长 It's a long flight from Beijing.
你一定累坏了 You must be exhausted.
我一直按西方时间作息 I keep Western hours.
和你们没有时差 My midnight is your midnight.
你已经看过计划书了吗 So, have you had a chance to look over the proposal?
看了 I have.
我们开始吧 Shall we?

精炼厂 The refinery.
与塔斯克先生合作 With Mr. Tusk.
与竞标价最高的人合作 With the highest bidder.
我们准备与克雷顿-维斯特签订一份 We're prepared to offer Clayton West
梅梅稀土金属精炼厂的40年租约 a 40-year lease on the Mei Mei Rare Earth Elements Refinery.
租约上会有我的名字 To which I will lend my name.
我知道你和雷蒙德是生意伙伴 I understand that you and Raymond are business associates,
但你还是得公开招标 but you're gonna have to open it up to bidding.
塔斯克先生出价肯定比其他人高 Mr. Tusk will outbid any competitors.
尽管如此  过场还是得走 Well, even so, you know, for appearances.
好吧  过场  如果你坚持 Yes. Appearances. If you must.
那这里就没问题了 So, there are no issues here, then?
我们继续吧 We may proceed.
第六页 Page six.
大桥 The bridge.
财政部外资投资管理委员会将批准 The Committee on Foreign Investment will approve
一项基础建设示范工程 a pilot infrastructure project
建设一座从杰斐逊港到米尔福德市 to build a bridge over the Long Island Sound,
横跨长岛海峡的大桥 from Port Jefferson to Milford,
以25年的过桥收费权作为交换 in exchange for a 25-year toll-taking contract.
在我们考虑大桥前 Before we consider the bridge,
我想先讨论另一件事 there's one more item I'd like to discuss.
"考虑"  我以为大桥的事已经定了 "Consider"? I thought the bridge was definite.
没什么是确定的 Nothing is definite.
这座大桥是首要任务 This bridge is a priority-one item.
对你们总统非常重要  我明白 It's very important to your President. I understand.
你想讨论什么 What would you like to discuss?
你们在世界贸易组织 The currency manipulation suit which
指控我们进行汇率操纵 you have filed against us in the World Trade Organization.
我们已经同意 Which we are prepared to drop
如果满足其他条件就撤销指控 if all other conditions are met.
我们这次会面就是为了讨论 The point of this meeting is to allow us
不适合在正式场合谈论的事  对吗 to say things that cannot be said in formal settings, yes?
是的  当然 Yes. Of course.
我们不希望你们撤诉 We don't want you to drop the lawsuit.
抱歉  我 Forgive me. I...
我不明白 I don't understand.
别在世贸组织让步 Do not back off in the WTO.
但你们在汇率操纵上 But you've been fighting us
已经和我们斗争多年了 on currency manipulation for years.
自由浮动汇率是大势所趋 A free-floating currency is inevitable.
这下我有下手的空间了 Now I have something I can work with.
为什么突然改变主意 Why the sudden change of heart?
并不突然  只是我们这些有远见的人 Not sudden, it has taken those of us who are more forward-thinking
花了很多年才说服其他同僚 many years to convince our counterparts.
那中国直接执行就得了 But China could just do it.
你我都清楚  你们不需要世贸组织的裁定 I mean, you know as well as I, you don't require a WTO ruling.
就像你说的  得走过场 Appearances, as you say.
一定要看起来像是受美国逼迫 It's important that it looks like America forced us out,
而不是我们主动投降 not that we gave in.
那我需要时间 Well, I'll need a little more time,
去和总统商量 so that I can brief the President.
我会耐心等待 I'm here for as long as necessary.
无论你要找谁商量 However you would like to communicate,
我都不管 I leave that to you.
谢谢  副总统先生 Thank you, Mr. Vice President.
谢谢  冯先生 Thank you, Mr. Feng.
在加夫尼我们有自己的外交特色 In Gaffney we had our own brand of diplomacy:
一边握手言欢  一边做好准备 Shake with your right hand, but hold a rock in your left.
看看是谁困在这儿了 Well, look who got stuck with the pool.
我们来这儿简直是找虐 We volunteered because we hate ourselves.
南方前线一切顺利吧 All's well on the Southern front?
没新闻就是没新闻 No news is no news.
我听说那里还有火枪呢 Come on. I hear there's muskets out there.
你什么时候能给我们点猛料 When you giving us something real?
我们正身处美丽的斯波特瑟尔韦尼亚 We're here in beautiful Spotsylvania, aren't we?
不过是给成年人玩玩具枪找借口 This is dress-up for grown men with toy guns.
听起来可以写上五百字 Sounds like 500 words to me.
告诉杜兰特除非我们在世贸撤诉 Tell Durant that China won't discuss the bridge
否则中国不愿意谈大桥 unless we drop the WTO suit.
你不是说他们不希望撤诉吗 I thought you said they want to keep it.
冯希望  说明塔斯克希望 Feng does, which means Tusk does.
但我们不知道北京是不是希望 But we don't know if Beijing does.
你觉得冯在撒谎 You think Feng's lying?
开放汇率会导致利率市场化 An open currency could free up interest rates,
减小中国的通货膨胀 reduce inflation in China.
他们两人都能受益 They'd both profit.
如果他们或者我们将了北京的军 If they're forcing Beijing's hand, or we are,
可能在峰会引起混乱 that could throw the Summit into chaos.
正是  冯可能有后台支持 Exactly. Look, Feng may well have support,
但我猜常委会有分歧 but my guess is that the Standing Committee's divided.
不管怎样  我们打他们个措手不及 Either way, we'll throw 'em off balance.
凯茜一宣布  我们就放出撤诉的风声 Let's leak we're dropping the suit as soon as Cathy presents it.
只是诉讼吗  不漏点别的什么 Just the lawsuit? Nothing else in the leak?
暗示与冯有关  但别点名 A hint of Feng, but no names.
让消息传一阵子再说 Let's let this grow on its own.
这回怎样 How was that?
好多了 Much better.
我感觉不错  你怎么看 I feel good. What do you think?
我看你准备好了 I think you're ready.
代码还得准备多久 How long on the code?
只差几个漏洞了 Just a couple of bugs to work out.
我说明天或周三我就能回去 I told them tomorrow or Wednesday.
活儿还没完 Work's not done.
我要是再往后推  你不觉得别人会奇怪吗 If I postpone again, don't you think it'll draw attention? I --
等完事了也就没事了 It'll be done when it's done.
漏洞修复了我就给你发邮件 I'll email you when the bugs are fixed.
挑一个公开的场所  约好时间给你 Somewhere public, a place and time.
你真想这么做吗 Hey, are you sure you wanna do this?
我明白风险多大 I understand the risks.
你自以为明白而已 Well, you think you do.
我也不是头回身陷险境了 This isn't the first time I've been in danger.
是吗  在《先驱报》被纸割伤过手吗 Oh, yeah? Paper cuts at The Herald?
死亡威胁  我揭露了一个特区贩毒集团 Death threats. When I exposed a drug ring in D.C.
我读过你写的报道 You know, I read the articles.
那根本不算什么 That's small time.
我差点就接受司法保护了 I almost had to go into protection.
这可是联调局  不是什么街警 This is the FBI. It's not a few street cops.
你觉得自己反抗当局 You think you're badass because
就是个了不得的义士吗 you're on some vigilante anarchy kick?
起码我有胆子在报道上署上真实姓名 At least I have the balls to put my name on the work I do.
但你没面临过几百年的刑罚 You've never faced a hundred years in prison,
你这自以为是的混蛋 you self-righteous prick.
我大多数朋友被关起来  永远出不来 Most of my friends are locked up and rotting away
就因为他们太多次以身犯险 'cause they poked the bear one too many times.
为什么  因为他们想揭露政府的监控项目 Why? They wanted to expose government surveillance,
棱镜计划  挪用公款  滥用职权  酷刑和欺骗 the PRISM program, embezzlement, abuse, fucking torture, lies.
你是个记者有什么了不起  我们是战士 You're a journalist. Who gives a shit? We're fucking soldiers.
这已经是我生活的一部分了 It's personal for me now.
我没选择了  但你还有 I don't have a choice, but you still do.
我也没选择了 I don't have a choice.
消息从哪来 Where did you get this?
你可以说消息源与中国代表团关系密切 You could say a source close to the Chinese delegation.
给我个名字 Give me a name.
我只知道是一个中国商人 All I know is that it's a Chinese businessman
和常委会关系非同一般  在峰会上进行秘密外交 with ties to the Standing Committee back-channeling the Summit.
-他人在华盛顿吗  -我不知道 - In Washington? - I don't know.
-在和谁接触  -这我也不知道 - With who? - I don't know that either.
如果我去问贸易代表处  他们会证实吗 If I call the USTR's office, they'll confirm?

反正明天他们也会把消息放出去 They're going public with it tomorrow anyway.
不如让你抢先发布 You might as well get the scoop.
为什么挑中我 Why me, specifically?
内战重演的报道配不上你这样的记者 You deserve better than a Civil War reenactment.
别装做你突然变成圣诞老人了 Please don't pretend you've suddenly become Santa Claus.
我现在帮你的忙  也许你会承我的情 I give you something now, maybe you'll remember.
将来有一天或许用得上 It's an investment in the future.
我可不太喜欢卖人情 I'm not big on favors.
所以我说了"也许" I just said "maybe."
马上给我接贸易代表处 Connect me to the USTR's office.
越过新闻发言人 Skip the Press Secretary.
跟他们说我想问世贸组织诉讼的事 Tell them I want to talk about the WTO suit.
你跟谁说了 Who did you speak to?

你透给他多少 How much did you fill him in?
没说多少 The bare minimum.
要是按之前说好的 I'd be a lot more comfortable
你亲自去说  我会放心许多 if it was you going directly, as we discussed.
这样就牵涉不到我  你也就更安全了 This puts distance on me, which puts distance on you.
你今晚亲自去见冯 I want you to meet with Feng tonight.
-不用中间人  -明白 - No proxies. - Understood.
古德温先生那边办得如何了 Now where are we with Mr. Goodwin?
随时可以下手  判个35年或者无期 Any day now. Thirty-five to life.
网络恐怖主义  判刑都很重 Cyber terrorism. Penalties are stiff.
务必做得干净利落  道格 This needs to be clean, Doug.
会的 It will be.
一击致命 One fall of the axe.
有消息告诉我 Keep me informed.
是  先生 Yes, sir.
我认为你的做法真是太勇敢了 Well, I just think what you did took so much bravery.
在直播节目上  当着全国观众的面 To go on air like that, in front of the whole country,
讲出你的经历 and say what you did?
这对我的确不容易 That means a lot to me.
我很钦佩两位的努力  为了帮助 And I admire what you both have been doing to advocate for the –
那些受害者 well, for the victims.
是女性  就像你和我  不只是受害者 Well, women, like you and me. Not victims.
还有男人  这无关性别 Men, too. It's not gender-specific.
是啊 Well, yes.
你愿意参与进来吗 Would you consider pitching in?
怎么参与 How?
如果有第一夫人支持  我们的表态就有力多了 It would send a strong message if we had the First Lady in our corner.
如果你觉得我能帮上忙的话 If you think I could help.
妇女党团的领袖 Well, if the head of the Women's Caucus,
以及白宫的第一和第二夫人加起来... both wives from the White House...
这样的组合他们没法无视 That's a meeting they couldn't sweep under the rug.
主席肯派人来  就已经是很好的兆头了 And the fact that the Chairman sent anyone is promising,
但我们得保证他真能听到我们的声音 but we need to make sure our message gets back to him.
只是  我没有过此类经历 I just...I haven't been through the same sort of experience.
这有什么妨碍呢 Well, why should that prevent you?
我不知道我是不是有发言权 I don't know if I have a right to speak about it.
你可是第一夫人 You're the First Lady.
你有权发表任何言论 You have a right to speak about anything you want.
-怀特先生  -马博利太太 - Mr. White? - Mrs. Marbury.
叫我苏珊 I'm Susan.
很高兴见到你 Well, it's a pleasure to meet you.
我知道这里挺偏僻的 I know I'm a little off the beaten path.
找这里困难吗 Did you have any trouble finding me?
不  您给的指示很明确  找起来很轻松 No. The directions were great. Easy as pie.
那就好 Well, good.
请进 Come in.

没想到你们这么快就要宣布了 I didn't realize you were announcing so soon.
我们收到了慷慨的捐款 We've had some great luck with the endowment.
我丈夫生前没受到多少嘉奖 Well, my husband didn't get much recognition while he was alive.
计划生育协会想以他来命名基金 I was so thrilled when Planned Parenthood asked to
真让我激动 name a fund after him.
您肯同意  我们也很高兴 Well, we're thrilled that you're open to it.
你之前打电话说有些问题要问 When you called, you said you had some questions?
问题挺敏感的  所以我想亲自来问 They're delicate. That's why I wanted to come in person.
怎么个"敏感"法 "Delicate", how?
很多人会抗议向未成年人 There are a lot of people who will protest
提供这方面的经济资助 this sort of financial assistance to minors.
我们得保证他们找不到诽谤我们的根据 And we want to make sure they have no cause to smear us.
我丈夫这辈子  总有人想诋毁他 People tried to smear my husband his entire career.
他从不让这些事影响他的工作 He never let it affect the work he was doing.
您丈夫实施过任何非法堕胎手术吗 Did your husband ever perform any illegal abortions?
我需要您的答案  马博利太太 I need you to answer me, Mrs. Marbury.
您丈夫实施过任何非法堕胎手术吗 Did your husband perform any illegal abortions?
我不想讨论这个 I won't discuss that.
没有未上报的吗 Nothing unreported?
年轻人  你年纪不大  不会记得 Young man, you're not old enough to remember.
但在过去  人人... But there was a time when everybody --
有没有涉及什么大人物 What about any prominent figures
能被反堕胎人士拿来当靶子的 who the Anti-Choice crowd could vilify?
没有 No.
马博利医生有没有为克莱尔·安德伍德做过堕胎 Did Dr. Marbury perform an abortion for Claire Underwood?
不  他没有 No, he did not.
我知道他做过 I know for a fact that he did.
这是谎话  我想请你马上离开 That is not true, and I would like you to leave now.
抱歉  马博利太太 Forgive me, Mrs. Marbury.
我对您没说实话 I haven't been entirely honest with you.
我叫赛斯·格雷森 My name's Seth Grayson.
我不为计划生育协会工作 I don't work for Planned Parenthood.

"人民币被刻意低估"是长期困扰中美经贸关系的一个焦点议题 多年来  美国国会一直指责中国政府刻意压低人民币币值 使中国产品价格低廉  出口后占据价格优势 许多议员将美国的对华的巨大贸易逆差  美国国内制造业的萧条 均归咎于人民币币值的被低估 在这个问题上立场最强硬的是国会中的民主党议员 他们背后大多有美国工会的支持 很多议员家乡有大量从事制造业的选民 过去这些年  美国国会通过听证会和立法等多种形式 向中国政府施压  该问题也是中美经济事务会谈争论的焦点

但白宫在汇率问题上的立场要软得多 小布什政府一直顶住国会的压力  拒绝将中国政府列为"汇率操纵国" 奥巴马虽然在竞选时接受了工会的巨额捐款 但上任后也没有在这个问题上满足国会的强硬要求 白宫非常清楚地认识到  如果在这一问题上同中国硬碰硬 导致贸易战  其结果将是两败俱伤 所以本届美国政府一直拒绝公开将中国列为"汇率操纵国" 2005年中国进行汇率改革之后  人民币一直稳中有升 中美之间的汇率问题也逐渐降温  一些美国智库的专家认为 即使美国现在决定到世贸组织就这一问题向中国提起诉讼 比起5年前来  胜诉的可能性也非常之小
